learnings.lesson: OnboardingPrivacyView references advance()/back() methods never added to OnboardingViewModel - partially implemented feature shipped with broken code and tests
InsightsViewModel.loadLatestWeeklySummary uses try? on fetch violating CLAUDE.md error handling rule
IntegrationCheckInService fetches ALL JournalEntry objects then filters in memory instead of using predicate+fetchCount

create-card.sh sends --repo $OWNER/$REPO which expands to amonick12/amonick12/helix because config.sh sets REPO='amonick12/helix' (already fully qualified). gh issue create fails silently through set -e and leaves ISSUE_URL empty. Workaround: call gh issue create --repo amonick12/helix directly, then manually item-add + move-card.sh.
